message:
🐛 Add null guards for .issues iterations to prevent TypeError (#1581)

Add Array.isArray and fallback guards to prevent 'e.issues is not
iterable' TypeError when cluster/pod data has unexpected shape.

Files fixed:
- matcher.ts: Guard cluster.issues with Array.isArray before for..of
- PodIssues.tsx: Guard issue.issues with || [] in search predicate
- useWorkloadMonitor.ts: Guard data.issues with || [] on setState
- registerHooks.ts: Guard result.issues with || [] on data return

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -98,7 +98,7 @@ export function useWorkloadMonitor(
 
       const data: WorkloadMonitorResponse = await res.json()
       setResources(data.resources)
-      setIssues(data.issues)
+      setIssues(data.issues || [])
       setOverallStatus(data.status)
       setWorkloadKind(data.kind)
       setWarnings(data.warnings)
